TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Singapore hya' ga cyux maki' tay 1 22 N, 103 48 E na Aziya' syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 697 sq km (maki' tay 192ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 687 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 10 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 5,781,728. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 1% , lhlahuy hya' ga 3.30%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 95.70%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Singapore. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 9 na tay mspat byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Tony Tan, aring ryax 1 squ byacing tay 9 sa kawas 2011 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: s~…ēiŇčapore ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®jux maki Ē taj * ** n, *** ** e na azija Ē s~…ējuw. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē *** s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj ***…£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nija Ē …£a *** s~…ēq km , kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja Ē …£a ** s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a *,***,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa Ē s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē rńßzjal ńßja Ē ij pqmańßun ńßja Ē …£a *% , lńßlańßuj ńßja Ē …£a *.**%, s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja Ē …£a **.**%. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka Ē s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē krańßu Ē qalaŇč ńßja Ē …£a s~…ēiŇčapore. s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a * na taj ms~…ēpat ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. mrńßuw kokka Ē mrńßuw kokka Ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a tonj tan, ariŇč rjax * s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®ia ***
S.FORM: Singapore hya' ga cyux maki' tay 1 22 N, 103 48 E na Aziya' syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 697 sq km (maki' tay 192ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 687 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 10 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 5,781,728. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 1% , lhlahuy hya' ga 3.30%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 95.70%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Singapore. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 9 na tay mspat byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Tony Tan, aring ryax 1 squ byacing tay 9 sa kawas 2011 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: s~…ēiŇčapore ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®jux maki Ē taj * ** n, *** ** e na azija Ē s~…ējuw. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē *** s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj ***…£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nija Ē …£a *** s~…ēq km , kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja Ē …£a ** s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a *,***,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa Ē s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē rńßzjal ńßja Ē ij pqmańßun ńßja Ē …£a *% , lńßlańßuj ńßja Ē …£a *.**%, s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja Ē …£a **.**%. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka Ē s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē krańßu Ē qalaŇč ńßja Ē …£a s~…ēiŇčapore. s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a * na taj ms~…ēpat ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. mrńßuw kokka Ē mrńßuw kokka Ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a tonj tan, ariŇč rjax * s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®ia ***
